message:
feat(ast): add Concurrent transaction mode and clean up clippy warnings

Add a new TransactionMode::Concurrent variant to the SQL AST,
representing the FrankenSQLite MVCC concurrent writer mode with Snapshot
Isolation semantics. Wire up the Display impl to emit "CONCURRENT".

Clean up clippy warnings in fsqlite-core tests:
- Rename segg/segg_len variables to general_seg/general_seg_len for
  clarity in FEC segment tests
- Replace #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] with f64::from()
  conversions to satisfy the lint properly
- Extract loop bound into named group_count variable with explicit
  truncation allow
- Remove unnecessary .clone() calls in db_fec and snapshot_shipping tests

Add tempfile as a workspace dependency for fsqlite-core. Re-export
Connection, PreparedStatement, and Row from the top-level fsqlite crate
for a flatter public API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
